pages.text: The $(item)Huge Aquatic Skyseed$() — not one island but a whole $(o)archipelago$(): five isles ringed around a central $(item)lagoon$(), clay- and gravel-rich.$(br2)$(bold)The cost$()$(br)End-game, like all huge seeds — a $(item)Large Aquatic Skyseed$() ringed between an $(item)Ender Pearl$() and $(item)Blaze Powder$(), packed in sand.
The large seed between an ender pearl and blaze powder, packed in sand.

$(bold)What you get$()$(br)A cluster of islands to bridge between, the centre one a $(item)lagoon$() with kelp and squid. Pack spare seeds and plenty of blocks for the crossings. $(br2)Water on every isle, cave systems and rare wrecks come in a later update.
